series_metadata.series_description: Files contain liability waiver, class roster, student evaluation, registration forms, and related information.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on AS/400 data base permanently ; Microform: diazo copy in operating area . master microfilm in off site storage ; Paper: in operating area 2 years
